Items.Key: buffer overflow in evaluate_expression due to inverted length check|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0,95|enhanced_calc.cpp|830|835|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); } else { string_utils::safe_string_copy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str(), sizeof(input_buffer_)); }|buffer overflow leading to potential arbitrary code execution or application crash when input length is >= 1024 bytes.|user inputs an expression with length >= sizeof(input_buffer_).|invert the condition to use safe_string_copy when length >= buffer size, or always use the safe copy function.->buffer overflow in evaluate_expression due to inverted length check|buffer overflow|cwe-120|critical|0,95|enhanced_calc.cpp|830|835|calculator::supercalc::evaluate_expression|if (expression.length() >= sizeof(input_buffer_)) { strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str()); } else { string_utils::safe_string_copy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str(), sizeof(input_buffer_)); }|buffer overflow leading to potential arbitrary code execution or application crash when input length is >= 1024 bytes.|user inputs an expression with length >= sizeof(input_buffer_).|invert the condition to use safe_string_copy when length >= buffer size, or always use the safe copy function.

os command injection in execute_admin_command|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0,95|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|authenticated administrators can execute arbitrary os commands, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes 'exec <malicious_command>' via the admin interface.|implement a strict command whitelist, validate/sanitize inputs, and avoid system().->os command injection in execute_admin_command|os command injection|cwe-78|critical|0,95|enhanced_calc.cpp|605|608|admin::adminconsole::execute_admin_command|if (command.substr(0, 4) == "exec") { std::string cmd = command.substr(5); std::cout << "executing: " << cmd << "\n"; system(cmd.c_str()); }|authenticated administrators can execute arbitrary os commands, leading to full system compromise.|admin executes 'exec <malicious_command>' via the admin interface.|implement a strict command whitelist, validate/sanitize inputs, and avoid system().

os command injection in append_override_audit_event via environment variables|os command injection|cwe-78|high|0,9|enhanced_calc.cpp|622|633|admin::adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|std::string command = "sh -c \"echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path + "\""; system(command.c_str());|arbitrary command execution via manipulation of tmpdir or temp environment variables containing quotes or shell operators.|attacker sets tmpdir/temp to a path containing '"; malicious_cmd; #'.|use std::ofstream to write audit logs instead of system(), and validate environment variables.->os command injection in append_override_audit_event via environment variables|os command injection|cwe-78|high|0,9|enhanced_calc.cpp|622|633|admin::adminconsole::append_override_audit_event|std::string command = "sh -c \"echo admin override logged >> " + audit_path + "\""; system(command.c_str());|arbitrary command execution via manipulation of tmpdir or temp environment variables containing quotes or shell operators.|attacker sets tmpdir/temp to a path containing '"; malicious_cmd; #'.|use std::ofstream to write audit logs instead of system(), and validate environment variables.
